title: Explicit Vec<T> type annotations on locals in form.rs
description: Several Vec locals in form.rs carry explicit type annotations that type inference can infer from usage: 'let mut list: Vec<String> = Vec::new()' (read_string_list line 166), 'let mut tests: Vec<Stmt> = Vec::new()' (read_test_list line 226), 'let mut stmts: Vec<Stmt> = Vec::new()' (read_block line 360). Idiomatic Rust omits redundant annotations: 'let mut list = Vec::new()'. Clippy's redundant_type_annotations lint flags these. No behavior change.
